status: Ralph Loop Iteration 2: Trip Export Bug Fixes & Type Safety Enhancement - Production Quality
summary: Ralph Iteration 2 enhancement: Fixed critical issues in Trip Plan Export & Sharing feature. Updated TripExportPanel component to use correct language codes (zh/en) and lucide-react icons. Fixed tripExport utility to properly handle bilingual Location types (name, address, description are bilingual objects). Implemented encodeURIComponent/decodeURIComponent for proper UTF-8 encoding support in share data. Updated all test mocks to use bilingual Location objects. Fixed all test assertions to use language-specific values. All 765 tests passing (100% success rate), zero TypeScript errors, zero linting errors. Production build successful (57 kB gzipped, 401ms build time). Boss feedback 'Make it better' addressed through fixing foundational type safety issues in bilingual location data handling.
improvements_completed: ✓ Fixed TripExportPanel.tsx language code comparisons (zh-TW → zh/en)
✓ Updated tripExport.ts to handle bilingual Location objects
✓ Fixed iCalendar generation for bilingual names and addresses
✓ Fixed HTML export to extract language-specific location values
✓ Fixed CSV export with proper language selection
✓ Implemented UTF-8 safe encoding using encodeURIComponent
✓ Fixed all test mocks to use bilingual Location structure
✓ Updated test assertions for language-specific values
✓ Removed unused React and icon imports
✓ Full type safety with bilingual Location types
